headline: Capital World Stake Puts Long Term Focus On EOG Resources Returns
summary: Capital World Investors has disclosed a nearly 10% passive stake in EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG). The position reflects a substantial institutional presence in the company’s shareholder base. The disclosure highlights a material shift in EOG Resources' ownership structure that may draw added investor attention. EOG Resources is a major independent energy producer focused on exploration and production, a segment that remains closely watched as investors weigh capital discipline, supply...
